name: cowork-business-os
description: Cowork Business OS — a working operating system for running your business inside the Claude Desktop app. Core plugin plus PRIMA add-ons for project management, session memory, and academic research.

plugins.name: cowork-business-os
plugins.description: Core plugin for Cowork Business OS. Scaffolds a new business workspace on your computer and ships the content-production skills used across every task. Required for PRIMA Project Management. Recommended for all users.

plugins.name: prima-project-management
plugins.description: Project tracking and session lifecycle for Cowork Business OS. Daily briefing, session close, project and client creation, milestone and task tracking, state management across your whole business.

plugins.name: prima-memory
plugins.description: Session history recall for Cowork. Searchable access to your past Cowork conversations through a pre-built index. Ask what you worked on last week and get real answers.

plugins.name: prima-scholar
plugins.description: Academic research and citation management for Cowork. Search PubMed, arXiv, Semantic Scholar, and CrossRef. Manage a local research library. Write with proper APA7 citations.
